title: Kconfig LICHEN_OSCORE_REPLAY_WINDOW range inconsistent with code limit
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/Kconfig line 32
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c lines 163-165

Kconfig allows LICHEN_OSCORE_REPLAY_WINDOW range 16-128, but oscore.c has:

```c
#if CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_REPLAY_WINDOW > 32
#error "CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_REPLAY_WINDOW exceeds 32-bit bitmap capacity"
#endif
```

The replay window uses a uint32_t bitmap, so max is 32.

Impact: Build fails with confusing error if user sets value 33-128 per Kconfig UI.

Fix: Change Kconfig range from `range 16 128` to `range 16 32` to match code capability.
